name: Time Wizard
description: Sextuple clock divider with triplet multiplier, AND/OR logic, dual-column clocking and reset configurations. Six dividers per pot, four switches yielding 81 routing variations.

controls.name: A1 Potentiometer
controls.description: Selects divider factor for output A1: 1 through 8.
controls.detail: /1 /2 /3 /4 /5 /6 /7 /8 · derives from Clock A input (with optional Multiply x3/x4)

controls.name: A2 Potentiometer
controls.description: Divider factor for A2: 1-8. When Logic A2 switch is active, A2 output is combined logically with B5 or A3.
controls.detail: /1-/8 · Logic switch alters output: AND with B5 or OR with A3

controls.name: A3 Potentiometer
controls.detail: /1-/8 · participates in A2 OR A3 logic when switch is active

controls.name: B4 Potentiometer
controls.description: Divider factor for B4: 1-8. In middle Clock B switch position, B4 clocks B5 and B6 (instead of incoming clock) giving unusual time signatures.
controls.detail: /1-/8 · can act as clock source for B5/B6

controls.name: B5 Potentiometer
controls.description: Divider factor for B5: 1-32-64-128. Long division range suitable for song-length timing.

controls.name: B6 Potentiometer
controls.description: Divider factor for B6: same long-range as B5. Reset B6 switch routes B6 as reset signal for column A (middle) or both columns (lower).
controls.detail: /1-/128 range · doubles as reset source via Reset B6 switch

controls.name: Multiply A Switch
controls.description: Multiplies Clock A by x1, x3, or x4 before feeding column A dividers. Enables triplet decompositions (/3, /3/7 etc.) and 16th→triplet conversion.

controls.name: Clock B Switch
controls.description: OFF (upper): both columns share Clock A. Middle: column B clocked from B4 output. Lower: Reset/In B jack becomes an independent clock input for column B.
controls.detail: OFF · B4-clocks-B5/B6 · independent Clock B via jack 2

controls.name: Logic A2 Switch
controls.description: OFF (upper): A2 acts as normal divider. Middle: A2 AND B5 (trigger only when both high). Lower: A2 OR A3 (trigger when either high).

controls.name: Reset B6 Switch
controls.description: OFF (upper): B6 is a normal divider. Middle: B6 resets column A each hit. Lower: B6 resets both columns.
controls.detail: OFF · B6 → reset A · B6 → reset A+B

controls.name: Half-Period Jumper
controls.description: Rear jumper configures B5 and B6 to produce half-period gates instead of triggers.
controls.detail: Jumper ON = square gates at divided rate · OFF = short triggers on all outputs

inputs.name: Clock
inputs.description: Master clock into column A and (by default) column B. Multiply A switch processes this clock before division.

inputs.name: Reset / Clock B
inputs.description: Default: resets every divider to step 1. With Clock B switch set to lower position, becomes an independent clock input for column B.

outputs.name: A2
outputs.description: Divider A2 output. Combined with B5 (AND) or A3 (OR) when Logic switch is active.

outputs.name: B4
outputs.description: Divider B4 trigger output. Can be internally routed as the clock source for B5/B6.

outputs.name: B5
outputs.description: Divider B5 trigger or half-period gate (jumper-dependent).

outputs.name: B6
outputs.description: Divider B6 trigger or half-period gate. Also routed as reset when Reset B6 switch is engaged (even while still acting as divider output).

behaviors.name: Six Independent Dividers
behaviors.description: Each pot divides the common clock by its selected factor, generating up to six simultaneous related tempos from a single master clock.

behaviors.name: Triplet Decomposition
behaviors.description: Multiplying Clock A by 3 lets column A divide into non-standard ratios like 3/7 or transform 16th-note clocks into triplets. Essential for weird time signatures.

behaviors.name: Dual Clock Domains
behaviors.description: Reset jack repurposed as second clock input. Columns A and B then run on independent tempos, acting as two 3-output dividers with unrelated masters.

behaviors.name: B4 Cascade Clocking
behaviors.description: B4 becomes the clock source for B5 and B6. Creates compound divisions (e.g. B4=/5, B5=/4 → effective /20) for extremely long cycle times.

behaviors.name: A2 AND B5 Logic
behaviors.description: A2 output high only when both A2 divider and B5 divider are producing pulses simultaneously. Accents coincide with song-section boundaries.

behaviors.name: A2 OR A3 Logic
behaviors.description: A2 output fires on either A2 or A3 pulse. Merges two divisions into a single rhythmic trigger stream without external combiner.

behaviors.name: B6 Reset Routing
behaviors.trigger: Reset B6 switch middle or lower
behaviors.description: B6 divider output doubles as reset pulse for column A (middle) or both columns (lower). Creates automatic phrase-length reset without patching a second clock divider.

behaviors.name: Half-Period Gates
behaviors.description: Jumper converts B5/B6 from short triggers to square gates at their divided rate. Useful for gate sequencing from the long divisions.

patchIdeas.name: Six-tempo master divider
patchIdeas.patch: Master clock feeds six voices at different rates: A1=/1 lead, A2=/2 bass, A3=/4 arp, B4=/3 hats, B5=/8 kick, B6=/16 chord change
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* A1=/1 · A2=/2 · A3=/4 · B4=/3 · B5=/8 · B6=/16
- Master Clock (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A1) c> Lead Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A2) c> Bass Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A3) c> Arp (Clock)
- Time Wizard (B4) t> Hat (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B5) t> Kick (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B6) t> Chord (Change)

patchIdeas.name: Triplet against straight groove
patchIdeas.patch: Multiply A x3 · A column divides the tripled clock for triplet feel · B column divides original clock for straight feel · triplets and straights layered from one master
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Multiply A: x3 · Clock B: OFF
- Master (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A1) c> Triplet Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A2) t> Triplet Hat (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B4) c> Straight Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (B5) t> Kick (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B6) t> Snare (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Self-resetting bar structure
patchIdeas.patch: B6=/16 with Reset B6 switch = lower position · every 16 clocks B6 fires and resets both columns · locks all outputs to a 16-step bar regardless of tempo changes
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Reset B6: reset A+B · B6=/16
- Master (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A1) c> Bass Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A2) t> Kick (Trig)
- Time Wizard (A3) t> Hat (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B4) t> Snare (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B5) t> Perc (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: AND-gated downbeat accent
patchIdeas.patch: Logic A2 switch = middle (AND B5) · A2=/4 AND B5=/16 fires only when both align = every 16th step · feed A2 to drum accent input for phrase-start emphasis
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Logic A2: AND B5 · A2=/4 · B5=/16
- Master (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A1) c> Drum Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A2) t> Kick (Accent) // only every 16 steps
- Time Wizard (B5) t> Section Change (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: OR-merged polyrhythm triggers
patchIdeas.patch: Logic A2 = lower (OR A3) · A2=/3 and A3=/5 merged into single output · 3-against-5 polyrhythm collapsed to one trigger stream at A2 for single drum voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Logic A2: OR A3 · A2=/3 · A3=/5
- Master (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A2) t> Hat (Trig) // fires on /3 OR /5
- Time Wizard (A1) t> Kick (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Dual independent clock domains
patchIdeas.patch: Clock B = lower · patch-in second clock to Reset jack · columns A and B act as two unrelated 3-output dividers · perfect for splitting a fast FX clock from a slow song clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Clock B: independent via jack 2
- Song Clock (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- FX Clock (Out) c> Time Wizard (Reset/ClkB)
- Time Wizard (A1) c> Song Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A2) t> Bass Drum (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B4) c> Delay (Tap)
- Time Wizard (B5) c> Reverb (Shimmer)

patchIdeas.name: Cascade for very long cycles
patchIdeas.patch: Clock B = middle · B4=/7 feeds B5/B6 · B5=/8 → effective /56 · B6=/16 → effective /112 · slow evolving structural changes from one clock without needing a LFO divider chain
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Clock B: B4 clocks B5/B6 · B4=/7 B5=/8 B6=/16
- Master (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A1) c> Drum Seq (Clock)
- Time Wizard (B4) t> Phrase Accent (Trig)
- Time Wizard (B5) t> Section A/B (Change)
- Time Wizard (B6) t> Song Part (Change)

patchIdeas.name: Odd time signature sequencer clock
patchIdeas.patch: Multiply A x4 · A1=/7 for 7/16 feel · B6=/7 with Reset B6=middle resets column A every 7 beats · drives sequencer in authentic 7/16 without manual reset patching
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Multiply A: x4 · A1=/7 · B6=/7 · Reset B6: reset A
- Master (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (A1) c> Sequencer (Clock) // 7/16 feel
- Time Wizard (A2) t> Kick (Trig)
- Time Wizard (A3) t> Snare (Trig)

patchIdeas.name: Half-period gates for envelopes
patchIdeas.patch: Rear jumper engaged on B5/B6 · B5=/8 and B6=/16 deliver sustained gates not triggers · gates open VCAs for entire division period, making a slow chord pad and bass-drone structure from clock alone
patchIdeas.diagram:
TIME WIZARD:
* Jumper: B5/B6 half-period · B5=/8 B6=/16
- Master (Out) c> Time Wizard (Clock)
- Time Wizard (B5) g> Chord VCA (Gate) // 1/8 period
- Time Wizard (B6) g> Drone VCA (Gate) // 1/16 period
- Time Wizard (A1) t> Hat (Trig)
